description: A new class of patrol ship designed by engineers at Etherbor's Lihoma Navy Shipyards, with the manufacturing contract awarded to Axilai Orbital Works in 504 FSC. The Woeful Cthonian is a compact vessel with average maneuverability and light firepower, designed for sustained operations in contested space such as the Frontier. It is unable to hold its own in sustained combat against proper warships; combat is not its true purpose. The Cthonian is a versatile support vessel built with a full state-of-the-art medical bay and integrated subspace telecommunications array. The Woeful Cthonian offers the technology of the Pan-Gezenan Federation to whatever post it's deployed to, creature comforts included.
